summary: L1,L2 exact identities; L3 exact subspace identity (fixed K) + oracle/floor invariance; L4 attack-independent expectation ceiling E_M rho = O(sqrt(s/d)+sqrt(log n/d)) under a Bernstein-type Beta projection tail, the security-relevant upper-bound direction. Round1 FAIL (over-lifted per-target Jensen bound to the metric; conflated ceiling with floor) -> reframed as max-bound + Bernstein union + floor/ceiling separation -> WARN -> cosmetic cleanups (n<=s targets, C-S zero-projection, conditional s<<d) -> PASS, zero FATAL/CRITICAL.
